mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL( MAX( FLOOR ) + 1, 1 ) AS FLOOR FROM dream_news_comment WHERE NEWS_ID = #{newsId}

SELECT c.COMMENT_ID AS commentId, c.USER_ID AS userId, c.USER_NAME AS userName, c.CONTENT AS content, c.NEWS_ID AS newsId, c.COMMENT_DATE AS commentDate, c.GOOD_NUM AS goodNum, c.BAD_NUM AS badNum, c.COMMENT_REL_ID AS commentRelId, c.FLOOR AS floor, c.LEVEL AS level, c.ROOT_ID AS rootId, c.MENTIONS AS mentions, c.ATTACHMENTS AS attachments, p.USER_ID AS replyToUserId, pu.USER_NICKNAME AS replyToName FROM dream_news_comment c LEFT JOIN dream_news_comment p ON c.COMMENT_REL_ID = p.COMMENT_ID LEFT JOIN dream_user pu ON p.USER_ID = pu.USER_ID WHERE c.ROOT_ID = #{rootId} ORDER BY c.COMMENT_DATE ASC, c.FLOOR ASC
